Browse Topics Search

Join us on the Internet

March 1995
Journalism & Newsroom

Instructions for subscribing to NICAR and IRE listservs where journalists discuss investigative reporting techniques and professional development.

Don't forget to keep up with NICAR on the Internet. Subscribe to our listserve, and join as reporters talk about how to do the job better.

Email to listserve@mizzoul.missouri.edu

In the message, on the first line, write: subscribe nicar-l your name. Join the Investigative Reporters and Editors' listserve the same way, except type on the first line of the message: subscribe ire-l your name.
